activeProposals.title: [Temp Check] Protocol Fee Expansion: Robinhood Chain

Foundation inspection request — Cantina bounty mediation policy enforcement (finding #784, 29-day stalled dispute) (https://gov.uniswap.org/t/foundation-inspection-request-cantina-bounty-mediation-policy-enforcement-finding-784-29-day-stalled-dispute/26160)

headline.en: Two live fee-expansion Temp Checks meet dormant positioning at $3.64 — asymmetric long window, but net emission still +2%.
headline.zh: 两项 fee 扩展 Temp Check 遇上 $3.64 休眠持仓 — 非对称做多窗口开启,但净增发仍 +2%。

keyChanges.en: Price +15.77% 7d to $3.64, closing distance to the $5.96 treasury burn anchor but still 39% below the DAO's own fair-value mark.
keyChanges.zh: 价格 7 日 +15.77% 至 $3.64,向 $5.96 国库销毁锚点靠拢,但仍低于 DAO 自己认定的公允价值 39%。

keyChanges.en: Two active fee-expansion Temp Checks (Robinhood Chain + v4 Protocol Fees) — first structural attack on the net-inflation problem since the UNIfication burn.
keyChanges.zh: 两项 fee 扩展 Temp Check 同时进入活跃状态(Robinhood Chain + v4 协议费)— UNIfication 销毁之后首次从结构上挑战净通胀问题。

keyChanges.en: Net emission stays +2.01%/yr: $7.39M annualized buyback absorbs only 2.03M UNI against 20M emission — bullish tape has not fixed the arithmetic.
keyChanges.zh: 净增发维持 +2.01%/年:年化 $7.39M buyback 仅回购 203 万枚 UNI,面对 2000 万枚年增发,行情走强并未改变基本面算术。

contrarianObservation.en: Uniswap governance has killed or diluted every meaningful fee-switch vote for four years running; a Temp Check is not a passing vote. If either fails at Snapshot, the 1.29 L/S retail long book unwinds fast on a $6.69M/day tape and $3.10 comes into play quickly.
contrarianObservation.zh: Uniswap 治理连续四年扼杀或稀释每一次实质性 fee-switch 投票;Temp Check 不等于正式通过。任一项在 Snapshot 阶段失败,1.29 多空比的散户多头在 $6.69M/日的薄成交量下将快速平仓,$3.10 会很快进入视线。

watchNext.en: Snapshot vote turnout and outcome on both Temp Checks — Robinhood Chain fee expansion and v4 Protocol Fees activation.
watchNext.zh: 两项 Temp Check 的 Snapshot 投票参与度与结果 — Robinhood Chain 费用扩展 与 v4 协议费激活。

watchNext.en: Funding flipping above 0.00% and OI breaking $16.86M — signals real chase money entering vs the current lack-of-sellers grind.
watchNext.zh: funding 由 0.00% 转正、OI 突破 $16.86M — 判断是否有真实追涨资金入场,而非当前依赖卖盘缺失的被动上行。

watchNext.en: Any forum surface for the real-yield RFC — currently absent from top-5 threads, and it remains the true regime-change catalyst.
watchNext.zh: 论坛是否出现 real yield RFC 相关讨论 — 目前热帖前五完全缺席,而这才是真正决定估值范式切换的催化剂。

fullReasoning.en: UNI printed +15.77% on the week with two live Temp Checks that directly address the net-inflation problem: Protocol Fee Expansion to Robinhood Chain, and v4 Protocol Fees activation. Both would broaden the fee base that funds buybacks. This is the first credible structural attack on the +2.01%/yr net emission since the UNIfication burn. Positioning is dormant: $16.86M OI against a $2.26B mcap, 0.00% funding, 1.29 L/S ratio — nobody is chasing. That asymmetry favors upside if either Temp Check clears. Price at $3.64 sits above the $3-3.5 retail capitulation zone but 39% below the DAO's own $5.96 fair-value mark, leaving room without immediate resistance. Caveats matter: $6.69M daily volume is thin, so this move is driven by absent sellers rather than fresh bids. Buybacks annualize to only $7.39M against 20M UNI emission, so even a doubling of protocol revenue barely flips the ratio. And the real-yield RFC — the actual regime-change catalyst — has zero visibility in this week's top forum threads. Trade the tape: treat this as a governance-catalyst window with cheap optionality, not a fundamental re-rating. Stops below $3.30, add on Temp Check pass, cut fast if either fails at Snapshot.
fullReasoning.zh: UNI 本周上涨 15.77%,同时出现两项直接针对净通胀问题的 Temp Check:Robinhood Chain 协议费扩展 与 v4 协议费激活,二者都将扩大 buyback 资金来源的手续费基础。这是 UNIfication 销毁之后,首次从结构上真正挑战 +2.01%/年的净增发格局。持仓面高度休眠:$2.26B 市值下仅 $16.86M OI(未平仓合约),funding 0.00%,多空比 1.29 — 没有人在追涨。这种不对称性有利于上行:任一 Temp Check 通过都可能引发补涨。当前 $3.64 已高于 $3-3.5 散户投降区,但仍低于 DAO 自己认定的 $5.96 公允价值锚 39%,上方短期无明显阻力。但结构性隐忧不可忽视:$6.69M 日成交量偏薄,这波上涨靠卖盘缺失驱动,而非真实买盘接手;buyback 年化仅 $7.39M,面对 2000 万枚 UNI 年增发,即使协议收入翻倍也仅勉强打平算术。真正决定估值范式切换的 real yield RFC 在本周论坛热帖前五中完全缺席。策略上把这当作 governance 催化窗口的廉价期权,而不是基本面重估:$3.30 下方止损,Temp Check 通过后加仓,任一投票在 Snapshot 阶段失败立即减仓。
